column2: B c = Оҳ вҖӢ ( M d ) , B r = Оҳ вҖӢ ( min вҒЎ ( M d , M B c ) ) = Оҳ вҖӢ ( min вҒЎ ( M d , d ) ) . formulae-sequence subscript рқҗө рқ‘җ Оҳ рқ‘Җ рқ‘‘ subscript рқҗө рқ‘ҹ Оҳ рқ‘Җ рқ‘‘ рқ‘Җ subscript рқҗө рқ‘җ Оҳ рқ‘Җ рқ‘‘ рқ‘‘ B_{c}=\Theta\left(\frac{M}{d}\right),\qquad B_{r}=\Theta\left(\min\left(\frac{M}{d},\frac{M}{B_{c}}\right)\right)=\Theta\left(\min\left(\frac{M}{d},d\right)\right).
